html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

The Dragonfly Boat Wheel is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Year of the Dragonfly. Can be used to steer a Boat with a Mast.

Works similar as Steering Wheel

Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit

The Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Steering Wheel then allows players to steer the Boat if one or several Masts have been placed on it.

Assets

  • Idle
  • Hit
  • Place
  • Burnt
plainText:
Dragonfly Boat Wheel
Object Info
Perk
Can be used to steer a Boat with a Mast.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Miscellaneous
"yotd_steeringwheel"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
“That'll steer me in the right direction. And the left direction.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“I'm great at steering! I don't even crash that often!”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Wolfgang likes steering shiny captain wheel.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Where would I even go?”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“I WILL STEER STRAIGHT BACK TO SHORE”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Let us be off, then!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Let's give 'er a spin!”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“That's the place for the person in charge. Me.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Great dragon, steer me to victory!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Can we steer for the race? Pleeeaase?”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Today I am sailing in style!”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Shiny wheel”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Good thing I've got a great sense of direction.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“I'll give the wheel a spin and see if I win!”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“Me steer, me steer!”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“I'll steer us straight to the finish line!”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
“I certainly hope all this gold doesn't weigh down the boat.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel
The Dragonfly Boat Wheel is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Year of the Dragonfly. Can be used to steer a Boat with a Mast.
Works similar as Steering Wheel
Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit[edit | edit source]
Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
"Take the wheel and go for gold!"
Object Info
Perk
Can be placed as a Structure.
3 min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotd_steeringwheel_item"
“That's going to be the steering wheel.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“Can't sail without that.”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“Is for making little whirly steer-wheel.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“It would make a steering wheel...”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“FOR BUILDING AN AWFUL STEERING WHEEL”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“A necessity should we want to steer our boat.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“Better make sure the boat's base is built first.”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“Hard labor? Isn't that Winona's forte?”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“A vital piece of a glorious vessel.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“That's for making a steering wheel.”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“We can't set sail without this.”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“For pointing Floaty”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“That steering wheel ain't gonna assemble itself.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“I can see the appeal of a steering wheel.”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“This go on boat?”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“It's probably a good idea to add a steering wheel.”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
“I hope I don't forget to add that to the boat.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit
The Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Steering Wheel then allows players to steer the Boat if one or several Masts have been placed on it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bánh Xe Chuồn Chuồn là một Vật Phẩm chế tạo độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Năm Chuồn Chuồn. Có thể dùng để lái Thuyền có Cột buồm.

The '''Dragonfly Boat Wheel''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Year of the Dragonfly]]''. Can be used to steer a [[Boat Kit|Boat]] with a [[Mast]].

Works similar as [[Steering Wheel]]
{{clear}}

The '''Dragonfly Boat Wheel Kit''' can be deployed on a [[Boat Kit|Boat]]. The Steering Wheel then allows players to steer the Boat if one or several [[Mast]]s have been placed on it.
